theme.description: High-contrast, authoritative, transparent. White backgrounds with strong tech-blue accents. Trustworthy government aesthetic meets modern SaaS utility.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, card headers, and kpi values. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all standard text, table data, and form labels. Good readability at small sizes.

mono.usage: Use for IDs, coordinates, and system logs.

primary.name: Smart City Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key branding elements. DO NOT OVERUSE.

admin_dashboard.description: High density data visualization. Use white cards with shadow-sm and 1px border-slate-200.

customer_browse.description: Visual focus. Large image cards with clear price and status badges.

agent_mobile.description: Touch-friendly. Large touch targets (min 44px). High contrast cards for outdoor visibility.

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

charts.styles: Use simple Bar, Line, and Pie charts. Avoid 3D effects. Use official color palette.

maps.description: Use full-width or large container maps. Overlay custom markers for billboards.

tables.style: w-full text-sm text-left. Header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider. Row: border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/50.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must have hover, active, and focus states. List items should stagger fade-in on load.

hero_billboard.alt: Modern digital billboard in city night
hero_billboard.usage: Customer landing page hero, login backgrounds

admin_dashboard_bg.usage: Admin login background, reports section header

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required packages: npm install lucide-react recharts react-map-gl mapbox-gl framer-motion date-fns clsx tailwind-merge
Setup 'react-map-gl' for the GIS Map component. Ensure it has a fallback if no token is provided.
Use 'recharts' for all analytics (BarChart for revenue, PieChart for category distribution).
Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) in the frontend routing.
Create a 'Sidebar' layout for the Admin Dashboard and a 'Navbar' layout for Customers.
Ensure 'Agent Dashboard' is strictly mobile-responsive (stack layout).
Use the provided hex codes for status badges explicitly. Do not use generic Tailwind colors like 'bg-green-500' without verifying contrast.

universal_guidelines.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers. Avoid cramped UIs.
universal_guidelines.alignment: Left align text for readability. Center align only for hero titles.
universal_guidelines.contrast: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: All inputs must have aria-labels. Images must have alt text.
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'login-btn', 'booking-card-1').
